title: SCQO run browser
description: Every measurement run. The run folders are the truth; this index is a rebuildable cache (python -m scqo <data_root>).

runs_by_tag.title: Runs by tag (e.g. cooldown1, bringup)
runs_by_tag.sql: SELECT run_id, started_at, experiment, qubits, outcome, tags, note, path FROM runs WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM json_each(runs.tags) WHERE value = :tag) ORDER BY started_at DESC

runs_by_qubit.title: Runs that measured a given qubit
runs_by_qubit.sql: SELECT run_id, started_at, experiment, outcome, tags, path FROM runs WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM json_each(runs.qubits) WHERE value = :qubit) ORDER BY started_at DESC

failed_runs.title: Recent non-successful runs (debugging)
failed_runs.sql: SELECT run_id, started_at, experiment, qubits, outcome, error, path FROM runs WHERE outcome != 'successful' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

fit_trend.title: Fitted quantity vs time (qubit=q1, quantity=t2_star_s / readout_freq / pi_amp ...)
fit_trend.sql: SELECT started_at, run_id, experiment, json_extract(fit, '$.' || :qubit || '.' || :quantity) AS value FROM runs WHERE json_extract(fit, '$.' || :qubit || '.' || :quantity) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at
